description_long: This is a modern built-in kitchen cabinet unit, featuring a combination of upper and lower cabinetry with a sleek, minimalist design. The upper section consists of white, handle-less cabinets that provide ample storage space, while the lower section includes wood-textured drawers and cabinets, a built-in oven, and a black electric cooktop. A white sink with a faucet is centrally located on the countertop, which is made of a light-colored material that complements the cabinetry. The unit is integrated into a partial wall structure, with a section extending to the right that likely houses a tall pantry or refrigerator. The flooring beneath the cabinet is a patterned laminate or vinyl in shades of gray and beige, adding a contemporary touch. No visible handles or glass panels are present, and the overall appearance is clean, functional, and designed for a compact urban kitchen setting.
description: A modern, built-in kitchen cabinet unit with white upper cabinets, wood-textured lower cabinets, a cooktop, oven, and sink, all integrated into a partial wall structure. The design is sleek, handle-less, and ideal for compact urban spaces.
description_view_0: Front view showing the full kitchen setup with upper and lower cabinets, cooktop, oven, sink, and partial wall structure.
description_view_1: Side view revealing the depth of the cabinetry and the wall structure, with minimal visible detail.
description_view_2: Rear view showing a plain, solid wall with no visible cabinetry or features.
description_view_3: Opposite side view highlighting the depth and the flooring extension, with the edge of the cabinetry visible.
